name: chrome-devtools-cli
tagline: CLI reference for automating the browser via chrome-devtools-mcp: snapshot, click, navigate, network, and performance commands.
verdict: Thorough, example-rich CLI command reference with a clear one-time-setup vs. AI-workflow split and defined output formats (Markdown/JSON). Gaps: no negative triggers versus the sibling MCP-based chrome-devtools skill, thin failure-handling for command/server errors, and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' exclusions despite direct overlap with the sibling MCP-based chrome-devtools skill.
Only the missing-setup case is addressed (points to installation.md); no guidance if a command errors or the server is unreachable.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the skill.
